final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] a,
    input [3:0] b,
    input op,
    output reg [3:0] out
);always @*
begin
    if (op == 0) // addition
        out = a + b;
    else // subtraction
        out = a - b;
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out <= a; out <= b;
    end
  end

endmodule
